channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Congratulations On Your Purchase Costs $1,000 on Steam, Seriously
item.content:encoded:
If you’ve got a spare thousand dollars just sitting around, then why not contribute to one of 2026’s most bizarre games: Congratulations On Your Purchase. Seriously, what is happening?

Congratulations On Your Purchase has appeared on Steam, and understandably, everyone is simultaneously confused, shocked, angry, baffled, amused, and wondering what’s real and what isn’t.

‘The Most Expensive Game On Steam’ is Congratulations On Your Purchase

To catch you up, here’s Steam‘s official description for Congratulations On Your Purchase:

‘The most expensive game on Steam. A palace, a red carpet, paparazzi, and a wall where you leave your name — visible to every owner who comes after you. Ten minutes. The price is not a mistake. It is the point.’

Not only does this short description get to the point, but it tells you EVERYTHING that happens in this game, and if I’m being cynical, I’m not sure what it is, because it isn’t a game.

  • More Insider Gaming: Devil May Cry Remake ‘Pretty Far Along’

The developer’s justification continues:

‘You paid for this. Not accidentally. Not on impulse. You saw the price. You read the description. And then you bought it anyway. Welcome.

There is no combat. There are no enemies. There are no quests, no skill trees, no loot boxes — well, there is one box, but it contains only the feeling of having arrived somewhere important. You will walk. You will look. You will leave something behind. That is all. That is everything.’

For $999.99 or £748, exactly, you basically pay to have your name on a wall. Once you’ve done this, you’ve basically seen everything that Congratulations On Your Purchase has to offer.

Even more eye-watering is the fact that the Steam page mentions: ‘Some of the store page artwork for this game was created with the assistance of generative AI image tools.

I have a feeling the discourse on Congratulations On Your Purchase is going to be fascinating, so keep your ears open for more on this game…experience… experiment?

If you missed it, I Am Rich was another similar game that operated in a familiar capacity to Congratulations On Your Purchase.

So, how many copies of Congratulations On Your Purchase are you picking up? Let us know through the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about The Last of Us 2 Multiplayer Mod release being announced, and don’t forget to sign up for our Insider Gaming Newsletter.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1829: Hints and Answer for June 22, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Wordle challenges players to guess a fresh five-letter word each day in six tries or fewer. Whether you’re a beginner or a daily player, today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1811 for June 4, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, June 22, 2026

Today’s Wordle answer for game #1829 is a moderately challenging puzzle. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 5 out of 6 guesses, though that’s still slightly lower than the 5.4-guess average for June 21.

General Wordle Hints For June 22

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: Describes the shape of an object.
  • Hint 2: Specifically when they’re egg-shaped.
  • Hint 3: Standing ____ion

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1829 for June 22, 2026.

Starter Words For June 22, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • AVAIL
  • OVENS
  • ELITE
  • ERASE
  • OUNCE

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1829 On June 22, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: OVATE

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

Ovate means for something to be shaped like an egg.

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1828 on June 21, 2026

Answer: ALIBI

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1829

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads-up. The game on June 23 will be Wordle Game #1830.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday Leaks Surface Online in HD But Are Quickly Struck Down
item.content:encoded:
Marvel fans everywhere are chomping at the digital bit amid the latest round of Avengers: Doomsday leaks. This weekend, footage and images surfaced across social media, revealing all-new snippets from the upcoming movie, but not before they were taken down again under copyright claims, which always goes some way to proving their legitimacy.

Now, those same fans are writhing in the agony of deciding whether what has surfaced is a legit round of Avengers: Doomsday leaks or some AI-backed concoction made maliciously to deceive these excited netizens.

Find out what you need to know about the latest Avengers: Doomsday leaks below.

In recent days, several images and clips, some heavily pixelated and almost indiscernable, made their way onto social media platforms worldwide, showcasing the latest Avengers: Doomsday leaks.

Folks took to artificial intelligence-backed solutions to clean up some of these traces, revealing clearer fragments of the upcoming movie, which is slated to be the most ambitious Marvel movie ever made.

For instance, we’ve seen shots of Steve Rogers and Thor front and centre, and the likes of Nightcrawler, Beast, Gambit, and Cyclops from the X-Men also appearing. In one sequence, Shang-Chi fights alongside the new Avengers. We also see the Avengers and X-Men squaring off against Robert Downey Jr’s Doctor Doom and the Sentinels.

Fans have started running their theories, making assumptions based on who is in these leaks and who isn’t. Many have noted that there are a few critical absences from what has leaked so far, including Captain Marvel, Spider-Man, Wolverine, and Deadpool.

  • RELATED: New Marvel ARPG Leaks Online

There are wraparound shots showing a full lineup of heroes, and some clips are heavily marred by watermarks, while others are clean as a whistle. It’s super tough to tell what’s a legitimate Doomsday like and what’s fake, but that’s the problem with content like this these days.

It’s the higher definition clips that have been struck down under the terms of copyright claims on social media. In these clips in particular, fans noted elements of unfinished VFX and some rougher cuts, reflecting the in-production nature of what’s being found.

What do you think about the latest Avengers: Doomsday leaks? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that a Wolverine actor will be in GTA 6, and for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Devil May Cry Remake ‘Pretty Far Along,’ It’s Claimed
item.content:encoded:
Capcom’s Devil May Cry helped pioneer the early-to-mid 00s hack ‘n’ slash genre, and while its fire had dwindled in recent years, the action-packed franchise could be returning soon with a DMC remake.

I would joke that Capcom loves a remake, but it does them really well, and the company has an unbelievable portfolio of games to modernize. Devil May Cry is easily one of Capcom’s most celebrated (and wacky) franchises, and following reports that the original Devil May Cry director wants to remake the first game, it appears a genie might have heard this wish.

Leaker Claims ‘You’re Getting’ Devil May Cry Remake

There’s a lot of ‘pinch of salt’ details to unpack here, so bear with me.

Firstly, the news comes from just your average leaker who has said:

‘Let’s be blunt about it. You’re getting a DMC1 Remake. Yes. just like those rumors said. Hearing it’s pretty far along actually but I’ll have to see for myself before making any release/trailer date bets.’

If it is real, then we might not be waiting years for it!

Interestingly, the account is followed by notorious Capcom leaker, Dusk Golem, and there’s a theory that this is a SEGA leaker, but one with a hit and miss record—meaning while this DMC remake rumour could be false, there’s also hope.

A subreddit thread also suggests it could be Midori (a leaker) under a new account name.

  • More Insider Gaming: CD Projekt Red Thinks Cyberpunk 2077 Failure Hasn’t Fully Recovered

Again, this is one to file under ‘keep an eye on,’ but don’t get your hopes up just yet.

If you’re already setting yourself up for pain or pleasure, then let’s stay on topic and check out Devil May Cry 5: Devil Hunter Edition.

Share your thoughts on a potential DMC remake via the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about The Last of Us 2 Multiplayer Mod release being announced, and don’t forget to sign up for our Insider Gaming Newsletter.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: GTA 6 ‘Cover Girl’ Has Responded to Claim She’s The Model
item.content:encoded:
A Colombian DJ has responded to claims that she’s the model of the cover girl on the recently revealed Grand Theft Auto 6 cover, after a widespread social media campaign to track her down.

Rockstar provided a long-awaited update on GTA 6 last week, announcing that pre-orders for the title would be available this week and revealing the cover art for the game.

The cover features a host of Florida-inspired environments, including alligators, but a mysterious cover girl caught the eye, with many working their hardest to track down who she could be in real life.

GTA ‘Cover Girl’ Responds to Model Claims

It didn’t take long for a flurry of social media accounts to speculate that the GTA 6 cover girl was modelled on Colombian DJ and producer Gabriela Chiquin, who has since addressed the speculation on Instagram.

In an image many are comparing to the cover girl on GTA 6, Chiquin posted a caption reading “they say I look like the brunette in GTA IV’.

She didn’t confirm whether the likeness was truly hers, and it may be a giant coincidence, which does seem likely considering the drama that Rockstar found themselves in with GTA 5.

  • Related: Over 60% of Gamers Think GTA 6 Will Cost More Than $70

Hollywood actress Lindsay Lohan tried to sue Rockstar over the alleged use of her likeness in the cover art for GTA 5, which featured a blonde girl in a bikini on the cover.

While Rockstar was ultimately successful in the court battle, it’s likely they’ll want to avoid any such controversy in GTA 6, and won’t have modelled the character on someone like Chiquin without a deal in place.

It remains to be seen whether Chiquin is the model in question, or whether whoever Rockstar used is just coincidentally a lookalike of the DJ.

Check out the most recent GTA 6 trailer below.

Do you think a new GTA 6 trailer will be released this week? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more GTA 6, check out players panicking after the disappearance of the release date, and be sure to subscribe to the Insider Gaming Newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: The Last of Us 2 Multiplayer Mod Release Announced
item.content:encoded:
Factions is still one of the best and most underrated multiplayer modes in gaming. The Last of Us Part 2 decided against multiplayer at launch, and we never got the long-awaited, post-launch add-on. Well, now it’s kind of happening.

Naughty Dog decided to omit a new Factions mode from TLOU Part 2’s release. It was devastating, but we thankfully got an amazing main game to enjoy at least. But a multiplayer component was announced, and was being worked on for a while, until The Last of Us Online was canceled ’24 hours’ before its reveal.

If you’re still pining for TLOU Online in Part 2, it’s coming in an unofficial capacity.

The Last of Us 2 Multiplayer Finally Happening, Sort of

YouTube channel Speclizer has posted 25 minutes of new gameplay footage from ‘The Last of Us 2 Multiplayer Mod.’

The progress looks incredible, and the video’s description has stated that September 2026 is the release timeframe for the mod. If you’re on PlayStation, you won’t be able to get any of this action, and it’s only coming to PC.

  • More Insider Gaming: CD Projekt Red Thinks Cyberpunk 2077 Failure Hasn’t Fully Recovered

Multiplayer is seamlessly integrated into the main game’s menu and hub, and features locations and gear from The Last of Us 2 as you’d expect from a multiplayer mode.

The love for Factions has never gone away, with the canceled Last of Us Online content being called the “Best Multiplayer Game” by Naughty Dog devs.

This should, hopefully, scratch that itch if you’re on PC. Another alternative is Terminal War, the much-hyped indie title, which also plays heavily into TLOU Factions gameplay, and we showed Terminal War’s latest trailer during the Insider Gaming Showcase.

Also, check out the full TLOU 2 multiplayer mod to see how it’s coming along.

Share your thoughts on The Last of Us Part 2’s unofficial multiplayer mod via the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the expected price for GTA 6, and don’t forget to sign up for our Newsletter.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: When is The Wish Upon a Jirachi Event in Pokémon Pokopia? Exact Start Time & End Date
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon Pokopia fans are preparing for an influx of new content following the recently announced Expansion Pass, but before that gets underway, the Wish Upon a Jirachi event this week brings new debuts.

After previous events in Pokopia introduced new Pokémon like Hoppip, Skiploom, Jumpluff, and Sableye into the fray, Jirachi is now making its own debut in the title, alongside new cosmetics.

If you’re keen to know exactly when the Jirachi event kicks off in Pokopia, Insider Gaming has all the details.

When Does The Wish Upon a Jirachi Event Begin?

Jirachi arrives in Pokémon Pokopia in the Wish Upon a Jirachi event on Tuesday, June 23, with its debut beginning at 5 AM local time.

Unlike previous events, you can’t time skip to access the Wish Upon a Jirachi event ahead of time, and you can’t roll back the clocks after the event concludes to experience it again.

  • Related: All New Mega Pokémon & Abilities in Pokémon Champions Regulation M-B

Similar to the other events, Jirachi’s arrival comes alongside a new item to collect. Interact with other Pokémon to receive Wish Notes, and complete the requests to transform them into Sparkling Wish Notes, which can then be exchanged with Jirachi inside a reconstructed Pokémon Center for new furniture and decor.

Of course, if you want Jirachi to stick around, you’ll need to build the Pokémon a Habitat, so keep an eye on exactly what the Mythical Pokémon needs.

When Does The Wish Upon a Jirachi Event End?

The Wish Upon a Jirachi event in Pokémon Pokopia will be available until July 8, 2026, at 4:59 AM local time, giving you plenty of time to complete everything there is to offer.

Admittedly, there’s unlikely to be an awful lot to sink your teeth into, if past events are any indication, and once you have a habitat built for Jirachi and unlock all of the available items, there won’t be too much more.

  • Related: All New Pokémon & Held Items in Pokémon Champions in Regulation M-B Update

However, the event is merely a drop in the ocean of what is to come in Pokémon Pokopia following the announcement of post-launch content, split into three parts, the first of which lands in August.

Alongside a free update unlocking underwater exploration, the new Expansion Pass adds a new town to explore and rebuild, alongside a slew of new Pokémon to meet.

Check out the trailer for the Expansion Pass below.

What are you most excited to see added in Pokémon Pokopia? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, find out how to get 100 free Quick Coupons in Pokémon Champions, and don’t forget to sign up for the Insider Gaming newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: New Marvel ARPG ‘Project Comet’ Leaks Surface Online
item.content:encoded:
A newly announced Marvel title has begun leaking online, revealing playable characters, voice lines, character models, and fresh gameplay details.

Known as Project Comet, the game is reportedly being developed by Scopely, the studio behind Marvel Strike Force, Monopoly GO, and Star Trek Fleet Command. The title appears to be another mobile-focused Marvel experience, this time built around replayable co-op missions and gacha mechanics.

More Project Comet Details

Outside of an initial reveal by industry insider Miller Ross on X earlier this month, very little was known about Project Comet. A closed playtest for iOS and Android users was scheduled for June, but details remained scarce.

That changed over the past few days, as leaker MultiverSusie on X shared a large collection of assets and information from the game, including character models, voice lines, and gameplay descriptions.

  • Related: How To Earn 2500 Free Units In Marvel Rivals—Summer Festival 2026

According to the leaks, Project Comet will feature gacha-style mechanics similar to Genshin Impact, allowing players to unlock and build teams of Marvel heroes and villains. The game is also said to draw inspiration from the Marvel Ultimate Alliance series, with replayable four-player co-op missions and higher difficulty options, presumably offering greater rewards.

The leaked roster includes fan-favourites such as Captain America, Spider-Man, and Wolverine, alongside more niche characters like Elektra, Juggernaut, and Silver Samurai. Check out some of them below, including a snippet of gameplay:

Judging by the leaked UI, each character will have a host of usable abilities, and you’ll be able to activate them in the usual mobile-game manner by pressing them on-screen. It’s unclear whether the game will arrive on PC, with no mention of the platform as things stand.

Interestingly, several of the leaked character models bear a strong resemblance to their Marvel Rivals counterparts; that’s reportedly because some artists who worked on Marvel Rivals are also contributing to Project Comet.

There’s an incredible amount of leaks to pore through, so if you want a closer look, consider scrolling through MultiverSusie’s X account and investigating them for yourself. In the meantime, check out the character reveal trailer for Cyclops in Marvel Rivals—will he be playable in Project Comet?

What do you think of the leaks? Does the game sound promising, or does the mobile premise put you off? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the expected price for GTA 6, and don’t forget to sign up for our Newsletter.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: What Time Does Fortnite OG Season 9 Release? Exact Start Time & Date
item.content:encoded:
After two weeks of enjoying the content added in Fortnite Chapter 7, Season 3, even more fun is being added by Epic Games with the start of Fortnite OG Season 9.

The latest seasonal shift is rolling back the clock to another iconic original Fortnite season, giving fans who want a nostalgic experience in the Epic Games title exactly that.

If you’re keen to know exactly when Fortnite OG Season 9 kicks off, Insider Gaming has all the details.

When Time Does Fortnite OG Season 9 Release?

Fortnite OG Season 9 is set to begin on Thursday, June 25, but the exact time the action kicks off is, as usual, not being revealed by Epic Games.

Instead, downtime will begin at the usual time of around 1 AM PT on Thursday morning, which is expected to last for around three to four hours.

  • Related: Poncle Rethinks Fortnite Crossover After Epic’s AI Push

Mid-season updates don’t usually result in the same lengthy downtime as bigger updates, like the change of an entire season, but, as the first update since the start of Chapter 7, Season 3, there could be a few issues to iron out.

In the table below, we’ve outlined the expected downtime start in major regions across the world.

What to Expect in Fortnite OG Season 9

The major changes coming in the next Fortnite update are, of course, the seasonal shift in Fortnite OG, bringing around the start of Season 9.

The new season is based around the original Season 9 in Fortnite, which saw Polar Peak melting and unveiling a giant Kaiju, The Devourer, and subsequently constructing Mecha Team Leader to defeat it in a major live event, which will almost certainly be revisited at the end of the season.

  • Related: How to Get Free Vinicius Jr. Fortnite Baila Emote

Outside of Fortnite OG, the main Battle Royale mode is receiving a fresh influx of Sprites to add to your collection, including a football-themed Sprite to coincide with the World Cup.

As ever, the new update will also bring about the introduction of new cosmetics into the Item Shop, including the recently revealed Krypto sidekick.

What are you most excited to see in Fortnite OG Season 9? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For your next read, take a look at how players are spending real money on Sprites, and don’t forget to sign up for the Insider Gaming newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android
